subject: gpio: add gpio-line-mux driver
expected_diff:
diff --git a/drivers/gpio/gpio-line-mux.c b/drivers/gpio/gpio-line-mux.c
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000..a4f3843062
--- /dev/null
+++ b/drivers/gpio/gpio-line-mux.c
@@ -0,0 +1,126 @@
+// SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-2.0
+/*
+ * GPIO line mux which acts as virtual gpiochip and provides a 1-to-many
+ * mapping between virtual GPIOs and a real GPIO + multiplexer.
+ *
+ * Copyright (c) 2025 Jonas Jelonek <jelonek.jonas@gmail.com>
+ */
+
+#include <linux/gpio/consumer.h>
+#include <linux/gpio/driver.h>
+#include <linux/mod_devicetable.h>
+#include <linux/mutex.h>
+#include <linux/mux/consumer.h>
+#include <linux/platform_device.h>
+
+#define MUX_SELECT_DELAY_US	100
+
+struct gpio_lmux {
+	struct gpio_chip gc;
+	struct mux_control *mux;
+	struct gpio_desc *muxed_gpio;
+
+	u32 num_gpio_mux_states;
+	unsigned int gpio_mux_states[] __counted_by(num_gpio_mux_states);
+};
+
+static int gpio_lmux_gpio_get(struct gpio_chip *gc, unsigned int offset)
+{
+	struct gpio_lmux *glm = gpiochip_get_d
... [truncated]
description: Implement a virtual gpiochip providing 1-to-many mapping between virtual GPIOs and a real GPIO using a multiplexer control. The driver registers a gpiochip that uses a mux controller to select the active virtual line for GPIO operations, handling get/set by switching mux state and accessing the underlying GPIO.
